title: malva africana
intro: Malva africana, also known as Mallow or African Mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Malva africana include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Malva africana can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
